scripts.build:debug:apk: pnpm run build:android:jni && cmd.exe /c "cd /d android && gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug"
scripts.build:release:apk: pnpm run build:android:jni && cmd.exe /c "cd /d android && gradlew.bat :app:assembleRelease"
scripts.rebuild:release:devices:adb: pnpm run build:release:apk && pnpm run install:release:devices:adb
scripts.rebuild:debug:devices: pnpm run build:debug:apk && pnpm run install:debug:devices
scripts.rebuild:debug:devices:adb: pnpm run build:debug:apk && pnpm run install:debug:devices:adb
scripts.windows:build: pnpm --filter @sprint-sync/windows-ui run build && pnpm --filter @sprint-sync/windows-desktop-tauri run build
scripts.windows:package:desktop: pnpm run windows:kill:port:9000 && pnpm --filter @sprint-sync/windows-desktop-tauri run build && pnpm run windows:start:exe
scripts.windows:package:desktop:build-tools: cmd.exe /c "\"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\BuildTools\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvars64.bat\" && pnpm run windows:package:desktop"
scripts.run:android-and-exe: pnpm run rebuild:debug:devices:adb && pnpm run windows:package:start:exe
